metadata.name: Set Up Utility Account for Vacant Unit

description: Between tenants, a property manager must transfer the electric utility account for a unit into the management company's name.

nodes.task_description: Contact the electric utility company to report a change in occupancy.

expected_outcome.value: The utility company is notified of the tenant move-out.

nodes.task_description: Provide the utility company with the management company's information to establish service.

expected_outcome.value: A new account is created for the management company.

nodes.task_description: Confirm that the utility service has been successfully transferred and the account is active.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives confirmation of the new active account.
